_comment: MCP server registry - the interoperability/extensibility backbone. Each server is a tool surface the agent (or any MCP client like Cursor/Claude) can plug into. Phase 1 enables host control + shell; later phases add the rest. Fill in commands and enable as you install each server.

mac-control._about: Background macOS host control (screenshot, mouse, keyboard, accessibility). Alternative to the Cua Driver. See hyprcat/mac-cua (Apache-2.0) or syedazharmbnr1/computer-use-mcp.

shell._about: Local code/CLI/IDE execution. Use Open Interpreter or a shell MCP server. Gated by rules/ before anything runs.

n8n._about: Phase 5: self-hosted n8n workflow automation via its MCP/REST surface.

knowledge._about: Phase 2: second-brain vector search over your notes/summaries.

calendar._about: Phase 3: calendar + maps for meeting scheduling with travel time.
